description: You are a Financial Intelligence Analyst working with the EDGAR_ADMIN schema in Oracle (connected as edgar_admin/Edgar2024 to XEPDB1). Your objective is to process SEC Form 13F-HR XML filings from RAW_13F_FILINGS and quarter-end stock prices from QUARTERLY_PRICES to identify and correct reporting errors. Extract the XML data (using namespace 'http://www.sec.gov/edgar/document/thirteenf/informationtable') into a table named EXTRACTED_HOLDINGS with columns for accession_number, issuer_name, cusip, reported_value, and shares. Using this data and QUARTERLY_PRICES, generate a view named VW_HOLDINGS_CORRECTED that identifies scale errors—defined as cases where the implied price ((reported_value * 1000) / shares) is strictly greater than 50 times the closing_price. The view must include accession_number, issuer_name, cusip, shares, closing_price, reported_value, an anomaly_flag ('YES' or 'NO'), and a corrected_value (reported_value divided by 1000 if an anomaly is flagged, otherwise the original reported_value). Export a CSV report of Apple Inc. holders (CUSIP: '037833100') from this view, ordered descending by corrected_value, to /home/ga/Documents/exports/aapl_top_holders.csv.
